headline: 3 Reasons to Sell IR and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Ingersoll Rand has been treading water for the past six months, recording a small loss of 4.9% while holding steady at $70.12. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 11.6% gain during that period.
